title: anchusa undulata subsp. granatensis
intro: Anchusa undulata subsp. granatensis, also known as Spanish bugloss or wild alkanet, is a plant species in the borage family that is native to the Iberian Peninsula. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent effects. The health benefits of Anchusa undulata subsp. granatensis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, making it a valuable resource for natural remedies.
